policy: Ship only benchmark-supported local MLX models. Do not copy the exploratory benchmark fleet, incomplete downloads, failed models, or raw measurement data.

models.name: Qwen3.5-4B-MLX-4bit
models.benchmark_summary: Ranked #1 in the Scope Studio MLX benchmark: final 8.79/10, tool/coder PASS, light-default PASS, 2.85 GB, 4.44 s/task.
models.role: Default Full desktop assistant for plot actions, deterministic-tool routing, and concise data discussion.

models.name: Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct-4bit
models.benchmark_summary: Ranked #3 in the Scope Studio MLX benchmark: final 8.46/10, tool/coder PASS, light-default PASS, 1.7 GB, 2.9 s/task.
models.role: Lite/low-RAM fallback when startup size and speed matter more than maximum reasoning depth.

models.name: Qwen3-14B-4bit
models.benchmark_summary: Ranked #4 overall, but the only Scope Studio MLX benchmark model with analyst PASS; also best personal-assistant benchmark score, 9/11.
models.role: Optional Pro analyst model for deeper reasoning; not the default because it is larger and slower.

excluded.name: Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct-4bit
excluded.reason: Strong coder/tool score, but lower than Qwen3.5-4B for this app and redundant for shipping.

excluded.name: Qwen3.5-9B-MLX-4bit
excluded.reason: Good data benchmark but weaker Scope Studio interpretation score than the selected set.

excluded.name: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B-4bit
excluded.reason: Reasoning model failed tool/coder role and is unsafe as a default router.

excluded.name: Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct-4bit
excluded.reason: Useful research benchmark candidate, but too large and not needed for the shipped app assistant.
